title: Interview (Personality Test)
subtitle: Track DAF analysis, personal profiling, mock sessions, and interactive skills assessment.

items.text: DAF State, District, Town context (History, culture, geography, economics, and famous issues of your home place)
Educational Background (Detailed review of college graduation subject, core theories, applications)
Hobbies, Interests, and Extracurricular activities (Substantive study of rules, history, current news related to hobbies)
Service Preferences & Cadre Choices (Justifications for rankings, why IAS/IFS/IPS, challenges, cadre policies)
Clarity of expression, non-confrontational delivery, and balanced intellectual posture
Dealing with stress questions, admitting limits of knowledge elegantly, and maintaining composure
Participating in Mock Interviews (at least 3-5 sessions) and taking constructive feedback
